description: Alfa Cytology provides end-to-end RDC development services, helping clients select the optimal radioactive emitter—alpha, beta, gamma, or Auger—based on clinical goals. Their offerings range from lead optimization to GMP manufacturing, with a focus on strategic isotope consulting. The company assists clients in evaluating tumor biology and ligand performance to determine whether an alpha emitter (e.g., Ac-225) is suitable for micrometastases, a beta emitter (e.g., Lu-177) for larger solid tumors, a gamma emitter for diagnostic imaging, or an Auger emitter for intracellular targeting. Beyond consulting, Alfa Cytology supports preclinical development and provides GMP manufacturing to advance RDC candidates toward clinical use. Overall, the company positions itself as a strategic partner for biotech and pharmaceutical firms developing next-generation radiopharmaceuticals, guiding biology-driven isotope selection while offering full-service support from discovery to manufacturing.
name: Guide to Selecting an RDC Emitter
